name: Minimal Hidden Files

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description: Performance/stability: skip automatic full-vault hidden-file rescan on startup; keep adapter patch lightweight and expose manual rescan command/settings button.
releases.name: minimal-hidden-files 0.1.3

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Community review warning reduction.

Fixes:
- Removes hardcoded .obsidian from source code; the vault configuration folder is denied through Vault.configDir.
- Removes optional i18n warning suppression patch to avoid unsafe any review warnings.
- Keeps 0.1.1 fixes: compliant manifest description and no direct Node fs usage.

Release assets for installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Community review fix release.

Fixes:
- Removes the word Obsidian from manifest.description.
- Removes direct Node fs usage from the plugin bundle by using the native adapter stat API.

Release assets for installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Initial public release of Minimal Hidden Files.

Release assets for Obsidian installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

Highlights:
- Reveals allowed dotfiles and dotfolders in Obsidian's native File Explorer.
- Excludes .obsidian, the active Vault.configDir, .trash, and .git.
- Enables unsupported-file visibility while active and restores the previous value on disable.
- Desktop-only, no custom sidebar, no custom file manager, no runtime dependencies.
